publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 165, folios 36-37. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: My Dearest. I mean this note to greet you in Town on your arrival early tomorrow morning, when I hope you will immediately go to bed. I shall probably be in St James's Square by 11 o'clock, but that must not keep you awake, or make you get up. The little Bird won't peck

at you if she finds you asleep.-- I have appointed Dr Locock, who is to be my accoucheur, to meet me either at 12 or at 2 o'clock tomorrow in St James's Square.-- my first interview with him. There is also one visit I must pay, close by. Except these two things, I am at your orders.
I much like your account of the improvements at Ashley.-- Your Dearest Little Bird A. A. K.
